n: Can I Transfer My GTA Online Character to GTA 6?
d: GTA Online character transfer to GTA 6 has not been confirmed. Rockstar has not addressed progress or character transfer. A fresh start is considered likely.
GTA 6 has real-time ray tracing confirmed by Digital Foundry analysis of Trailer 2. Hardware-accelerated on PS5 and Xbox Series X/S.
No GTA 6 cheats confirmed yet. Every previous GTA game has had cheat codes. GTA 6 cheat codes will be confirmed at or after launch.

n: How Big Is the GTA 6 Download?
d: GTA 6 download size not confirmed. Based on GTA 5 at 90GB and the scale of GTA 6, estimates range from 100GB to 150GB. Official size unannounced.

n: Is There Early Access for GTA 6?
d: No GTA 6 early access or pre-load date confirmed. Rockstar has not announced early access. Pre-load dates typically go live 3-7 days before launch.

n: How Big Is the GTA 6 Map?
d: GTA 6 map size not officially confirmed. Community analysis and leaker estimates suggest it is larger than GTA 5 but comparable to RDR2. Full breakdown.
GTA 6 pre-orders not yet open. Based on previous Rockstar releases, pre-orders expected to open 3-6 months before the November 19, 2026 launch.

n: GTA 6: PS5 vs Xbox Series X
d: No official performance differences confirmed between GTA 6 on PS5 and Xbox Series X/S. Digital Foundry analysis of trailers shows comparable rendering.

n: How Does the GTA 6 Wanted System Work?
d: GTA 6 has seven confirmed law enforcement agencies across Leonida with distinct jurisdictions. VCPD, VCSO, LSP, NOOSE, and more confirmed in official footage.
No official GTA 6 price confirmed. Analyst estimates range from $70 to $100. No Collector's Edition officially announced. Full pricing breakdown.
No PC release date confirmed for GTA 6. Based on previous GTA history, a PC port is expected 12-18 months after the November 2026 console launch.
GTA 6 cross-platform multiplayer has not been confirmed. GTA Online has never been cross-platform. The pattern suggests GTA 6 Online will follow the same model.
GTA 6 will not be on Game Pass at launch. Strauss Zelnick confirmed this. A title of this scale on day-one subscription is inconsistent with Take-Two's model.

n: What Is the GTA 6 Age Rating?
d: GTA 6 is not yet officially ESRB rated. Australia rated it MA15+. Every mainline GTA has received M (17+) from ESRB and PEGI 18 in Europe.
GTA 6 releases November 19, 2026 on PS5 and Xbox Series X/S. Confirmed by Rockstar Newswire on November 6, 2025. No PC date announced.

n: Who Are the Main Characters in GTA 6?
d: GTA 6 has two confirmed protagonists: Lucia Caminos and Jason Duval. Full character profiles, confirmed connections, and supporting cast in the database.
Amusement parks confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Rides, boardwalk attractions, and the Vice City entertainment infrastructure. Confirmed in Trailer 1.
Basketball confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Street courts in Vice City districts. Confirmed in Trailer 2. Playable minigame activity.
Cage fighting confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Underground MMA in Vice City venues. Confirmed in official footage. Money, crowds, and controlled violence.
Car meets confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Custom vehicles, the High Rollerz circuit, and Vice City's street-level car culture. Confirmed in Trailer 1.
Cardio training confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Running, cycling, and fitness activity in Vice City. Confirms the returning character stats system.
Combat training confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Skill development at training facilities in Vice City. Unlocks fighting capability across activities.
Community service confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. A parole condition for Lucia Caminos — roadside cleanup under officer supervision in the Leonida Keys.
Diving confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Underwater exploration in the Keys and off Vice City. Coral reefs and submerged locations. Confirmed in Trailer 2.
DJ and music activity confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Club DJ sets and music performance in Vice City nightlife venues. Confirmed in both trailers.
Drinking confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Bar visits and alcohol in Vice City venues. Affects character state and vision. Confirmed in both trailers.
Fencing confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Selling stolen goods through fence contacts. The income layer that converts criminal activity into usable cash.
Fishing confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Lake Leonida, the Keys, and coastal spots. Largemouth bass and tropical species. Confirmed in both trailers.
Gambling confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Casinos, card games, and betting in Vice City. Full casino mechanic. Confirmed in both trailers.
Games confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Arcade machines, pool, darts, and minigames in Vice City bars and venues. Confirmed in official footage.
Golf confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Full golf course in Vice County. Returns from GTA 5 with updated mechanics. Confirmed in official footage.
Hunting confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Deer, boar, and game animals in the rural Vice County interior. Confirmed in official footage.
Kayaking confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Waterway exploration in the Keys and Grassrivers. Confirmed in official footage.
Mini golf confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Beachfront and tourist zone courses in Vice City. Confirmed in official footage.
Mountain drifting confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Off-road driving on Mount Kalaga and elevated terrain. Confirmed in official footage.
Mudding confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Off-road truck activity in rural Vice County. Confirmed in Trailer 2. Florida truck culture activity.
Racing confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Street racing, track events, and the High Rollerz circuit in Vice City. Confirmed in both trailers.
Robbery confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Store holdups, vehicle heists, and property crime. Confirmed in both trailers as a primary criminal activity.
Selling drugs confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Street distribution across Vice City and Vice County. Connected to multiple factions and the criminal economy.
Snooker confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Dedicated cue sport in Vice City venues. Confirmed in official footage.
Social media confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Snapmatic and in-game posting. Content culture mechanics. Confirmed in both trailers.
Street takeovers confirmed in GTA 6. Intersection blockades and sideshows in Vice City. Confirmed in Trailer 1. The 7X signature move.
Strip clubs confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Jack of Hearts and adult entertainment venues in Vice City. Confirmed in official footage.
Tennis confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Returns from GTA 5. Court play in Vice City with updated mechanics. Confirmed in official footage.
Vehicle customization confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Full modification at Vice City shops. Confirmed in both trailers across multiple vehicle types.
Watching TV confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Weazel News and original in-game programming in safehouses and venues. Confirmed in official footage.
Weed growing confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Indoor operations and rural cultivation. Ties into the drug distribution network across Vice County.
Weightlifting confirmed in GTA 6 Leonida. Gym-based strength training in Vice City. Returns from GTA San Andreas. Confirmed in official footage.
The American Alligator in GTA 6. Wetland apex predator. Lethal in water. Confirmed in Trailer 1 in Grassrivers wetland and golf course sequences.
The Wild Boar in GTA 6. Aggressive invasive species. Charges on provocation. Confirmed in woodland and rural sequences in official footage.
The Cat in GTA 6. Domestic feline across Vice City and suburban Leonida. Ignores the player entirely. Confirmed as ambient wildlife in official footage.
The Crayfish in GTA 6. Freshwater crustacean in Leonida swamp shallows and river beds. Bait species. Environmental detail in the Grassrivers.
The Dobermann in GTA 6. Guard dog at secured properties across Leonida. Trained attack response when triggered. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage.
The Dolphin in GTA 6. Marine mammal in coastal Leonida waters and boat wakes. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage in coastal and Keys sequences.
The Duck in GTA 6. Freshwater game bird at Leonida lakes and rivers. Common near water. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage.
The American Eel in GTA 6. River scavenger and catadromous fish across Leonida waterways. Present as environmental detail in rivers and coastal margins.
The American Flamingo lives in the Grassrivers wetlands of Leonida. Moves in massive flocks. Passive threat. The visual signature of the state.
The Florida Panther in GTA 6. Lethal apex predator. Extremely rare. Confirmed in Red Hill Forest and Leonida inland wilderness. Attacks on sight.
The Fox in GTA 6. Elusive wild canid across rural and suburban Leonida. Avoids contact. Confirmed in woodland edge and suburban zones in official footage.
The Heron in GTA 6. Wading bird at Leonida waterways. Patient predator at the waterline. Confirmed in coastal and freshwater footage.
The Green Iguana in GTA 6. Invasive suburban pest across Vice City residential areas. Falls from trees in cold weather. Confirmed in official footage.
The Largemouth Bass in GTA 6. Primary freshwater game fish across Leonida lakes and rivers. Trophy fishing confirmed as an activity in official footage.
The Lizard in GTA 6. Small anole on every warm surface in Leonida. Universal ambient wildlife from Vice City to the Keys.
The Manatee in GTA 6. Protected sea cow in Leonida's coastal shallows. Cannot be harmed without consequence. Confirmed in official footage.
The Opossum in GTA 6. Nocturnal scavenger across suburban and rural Leonida. Plays dead when threatened. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage.
The Pelican in GTA 6. Coastal bird across the Leonida Keys and Vice City shoreline. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage in coastal and water sequences.
The Burmese Python in GTA 6. Invasive ambush constrictor in the Grassrivers. Confirmed in swamp interior zones in official Rockstar footage.
The Raccoon in GTA 6. Urban scavenger across Vice City and suburban Leonida. Investigates food sources at night. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage.
The Rock Pigeon in GTA 6. Urban pest across Vice City rooftops and street level. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage in multiple urban sequences.
The Roseate Spoonbill in GTA 6. Exotic wading bird in the Grassrivers wetlands. Distinctive pink colouring. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage.
The Sea Turtle in GTA 6. Protected marine reptile in Leonida coral reef zones and Keys waters. Confirmed in underwater sequences in official footage.
The Seagull in GTA 6. Beach scavenger across Vice City coastline and marina. Loudest ambient wildlife in the game. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage.
The Shark in GTA 6. Marine apex predator in open Atlantic waters off Leonida. Lethal. Confirmed in open-water sequences in official Rockstar footage.
The Skunk in GTA 6. Chemical defence hazard. Punishes close approach. Confirmed in woodland zones across Leonida in official footage.
The Skunk Ape in GTA 6. Leonida cryptid. Reported in the Grassrivers swamp. Unconfirmed as an interactive entity. The Leonida equivalent of Bigfoot.
The Snake in GTA 6. Venomous serpent across Leonida woodland and wetland zones. Strikes without warning when approached. Confirmed in official footage.
The Southern Leopard Frog in GTA 6. Ambient wetland species in the Grassrivers. The night chorus of Leonida. Confirmed in official footage.
The Squirrel in GTA 6. Urban rodent in Vice City parks. Ambient wildlife. Fast and small. Confirmed in urban and suburban sequences.
The Whale in GTA 6. Deep sea marine animal in the open Atlantic off Leonida. Rare sighting. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage in deep-water sequences.
The White-Tailed Deer in GTA 6. Primary game animal across Leonida. Flees on detection. Confirmed in woodland and grassland zones in official footage.
Adios Airlines in GTA 6. The budget carrier of Leonida. The name says goodbye. The experience confirms it. Confirmed in official footage.
AirEmu in GTA 6. The mid-tier airline of Leonida. The emu is on the tail. The service is what it is. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Ammu-Nation in GTA 6. Leonida's firearm retailer. On every block that permits it. Confirmed in both trailers across Vice City and Vice County.
Annis in GTA 6. Japanese sports car manufacturer in Leonida. Elegy Retro Custom and Hellion confirmed in official footage.
Archez in GTA 6. The roast-meat fast food chain on every Leonida strip mall. Confirmed in Vice County in official footage. Parody of real-world Arby's.
Bahama Mamas in GTA 6. The Vice City nightclub institution. Returning from GTA Vice City. Confirmed in both trailers.
Benefactor in GTA 6. German luxury car manufacturer in Leonida. Schafter LWB and Schafter V12 confirmed in official footage.
Binco in GTA 6. The value clothing chain of Leonida. Where the budget goes first. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Bravado in GTA 6. The American truck and muscle car manufacturer. The pickup truck of Vice County. Confirmed in both trailers.
Buff Beer in GTA 6. The gym-to-beach lager of Vice City. Sponsorships at every marina and sports venue. Confirmed in official footage.
Burger Shot in GTA 6. Leonida's most saturated fast food chain. The mascot is everywhere. Confirmed in both trailers across Vice City.
Cherry Popper Ice Cream in GTA 6. The pink trucks are back. A Vice City institution with a secondary business model. Confirmed in official footage.
Cluckin' Bell in GTA 6. Hybrid fast food franchise in Vice City. The rooster logo. Confirmed in both trailers. Parody of KFC and Taco Bell.
CNT in GTA 6. The cable news rival to Weazel News. Leonida's second opinion. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Cool Beans in GTA 6. Vice City coffee chain. On every corner. The menu requires prior study. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Debonaire Cigarettes in GTA 6. The premium tobacco brand of Leonida. Vintage advertising. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Declasse in GTA 6. The everyday American car brand of Leonida. The family sedan that ends up in every scene. Confirmed in both trailers.
Didier Sachs in GTA 6. The high-fashion label of Vice City. The bag says what the owner cannot. Confirmed in official footage.
Dinka in GTA 6. Japanese compact car and motorcycle manufacturer in Leonida. Blista Compact and Double-T confirmed in footage.
eCola in GTA 6. The default soda of Leonida. In every vending machine and gas station in the state. Confirmed in both trailers.
FlyUS in GTA 6. The premium Leonida carrier. The flag airline of the GTA series. Confirmed at Vice City International in official footage.
Gallivanter in GTA 6. British luxury SUV manufacturer in Leonida. Baller and Baller ST confirmed in official footage.
Global Oil in GTA 6. The dominant energy brand of Leonida. Refineries and gas stations. Confirmed in Vice County in official footage.
GoPostal in GTA 6. The delivery and logistics brand of Leonida. The yellow vans. Confirmed in both trailers on Vice City roads.
Grotti in GTA 6. The Italian exotic manufacturer. Heard before seen. Confirmed in Vice City in both trailers.
Hank's Waffles in GTA 6. The twenty-four-hour diner on Leonida's highways. Always open. Confirmed in Vice County in official footage.
Horny's in GTA 6. The Vice City beachfront restaurant. The wings are good. Confirmed in both trailers on the Vice City strip.
Invetero in GTA 6. The American luxury car manufacturer. Old money on four wheels. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Karin in GTA 6. Japanese performance car manufacturer in Leonida. Futo, Sultan, Sultan RS, and Rebel confirmed in footage.
Logger Beer in GTA 6. The blue-collar default lager of Leonida. The hardhat logo. Confirmed in Vice County in official footage.
Maibatsu in GTA 6. Japanese commercial vehicle manufacturer in Leonida. Mule, Penumbra, Sanchez, and Sanchez Livery confirmed.
Nagasaki in GTA 6. Japanese powersports and marine manufacturer in Leonida. Blazer, Carbon RS, Dinghy, and Outlaw confirmed.
Obey in GTA 6. German performance car manufacturer in Leonida. Omnis E-GT and Tailgater confirmed in official footage.
Ocelot in GTA 6. The British sports car manufacturer. Restrained on the outside. Catastrophic under the bonnet. Confirmed in both trailers.
Only Raw Records in GTA 6. The Vice City independent music label. Confirmed in official footage. The roster is Vice City.
OnlyBangs in GTA 6. The adult content platform of Leonida. The Vice City creator economy at its most direct. Confirmed in official footage.
Patriot Beer in GTA 6. Freedom in every can. The beer of Leonida patriotic events. Confirmed in Vice County in official footage.
Pegassi in GTA 6. The Italian exotic manufacturer. The Zentorno confirmed in Trailer 1. The loudest thing on the Vice City waterfront.
Pfister in GTA 6. The German performance manufacturer. Engineering first. Statement second. Confirmed in Vice City in both trailers.
Pißwasser in GTA 6. The imported German lager on every Vice City bar shelf. The umlaut does serious work. Confirmed in both trailers.
Ponsonbys in GTA 6. The premium menswear label of Leonida. Where the suit comes from. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Post OP in GTA 6. The courier and logistics rival to GoPostal. Different vans, same roads. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
ProLaps in GTA 6. The sports apparel brand of Leonida. The name is a concern. The market share is not. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Redwood Cigarettes in GTA 6. The volume tobacco brand of Leonida. On every counter in the state. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Ron Oil in GTA 6. The second energy brand of Leonida. The gas stations are orange. Confirmed in Vice County in official footage.
Schyster in GTA 6. American executive car manufacturer in Leonida. PMP 700 confirmed in official footage.
Scooter Brothers in GTA 6. The scooter rental brand of Leonida. On every Vice City corner. Confirmed in both trailers.
Sessanta Nove in GTA 6. The Italian luxury label in Vice City. Where the money goes when it wants an accent. Confirmed in official footage.
Snapmatic in GTA 6. The in-game social photo platform. The Vice City feed. Confirmed as a gameplay mechanic in official footage.
Sprunk in GTA 6. The green can. eCola's permanent rival in Leonida. Athletic sponsorships confirmed. Present in both trailers.
SubUrban in GTA 6. The streetwear brand of Leonida. Between the mall and the corner. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
TacoBomb in GTA 6. Value-tier fast food on every Vice City block. The late-night drive-thru of choice. Confirmed in both trailers.
Tequi-la-la in GTA 6. The Vice City bar institution. The name is the joke, the drinks are real. Confirmed in official footage.
Übermacht in GTA 6. The German luxury performance brand of Leonida. The umlaut is earned. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Vapid in GTA 6. The American mass-market manufacturer. The police car and the muscle car. Confirmed in both trailers across Leonida.
Vice News Network in GTA 6. The local Vice City news channel. Closer to the story than anyone should be. Confirmed in official footage.
Victim in GTA 6. The dark streetwear label of Vice City. The brand name is the joke and also the target market. Confirmed in official footage.
Weazel News in GTA 6. Leonida's most trusted misinformation service. Confirmed in both trailers. The helicopter is always there.
Western in GTA 6. American motorcycle manufacturer in Leonida. Western Nightblade confirmed in official footage.
ZIP in GTA 6. The mid-market clothing retailer of Leonida. Between Binco and the luxury brands. Confirmed in Vice City in official footage.
Bae-Lux in GTA 6. Vice City influencer and co-founder of Real Dimez alongside Roxy. Central figure in Vice City nightlife and the Only Raw Records circuit.
Boobie Ike in GTA 6. Vice City nightclub owner and entertainment mogul. Runs a flagship club and recording studio alongside Dre'Quan Priest.
Brian Heder is a confirmed GTA 6 character. Boatyard operator and smuggling veteran. Provides housing to Jason Duval in exchange for operational support.
Cal Hampton in GTA 6. Signal intelligence in Vice County. Monitors Coast Guard frequencies. Connected to Jason Duval and the Heder boatyard network.
Dre'Quan Priest is a confirmed GTA 6 character. Founder of Only Raw Records. Books acts for Boobie Ike venues and manages Real Dimez in Vice City.
DWNPLY in GTA 6. Local Vice City rapper who collaborated with Real Dimez on their breakout hit five years before the events of GTA 6.
Erin Henshaw in GTA 6. Local politician running for mayor near Ambrosia. Seen on campaign signs in official Rockstar screenshots.
Jason Duval is a confirmed GTA 6 protagonist. Leonida native, former military, drug running background. Operating across Vice County with Lucia Caminos.
Lori Heder in GTA 6. Brian Heder's third wife. Works at the Heder boatyard in the Leonida Keys. Confirmed in Trailer 2.
Lucia Caminos is a confirmed GTA 6 protagonist. Recently paroled from Leonida State Penitentiary, operating across Vice County with Jason Duval.
Phil Cassidy in GTA 6. Arms dealer running Phil's Ammu-Nation in Vice County. HD Universe return of the GTA series veteran. Both arms intact.
Raul Bautista is a confirmed GTA 6 character. Veteran bank robber in Vice County. Recruits talent and runs high-stakes heist operations across Leonida.
Roxy in GTA 6. Rapper and Real Dimez co-founder alongside Bae-Lux. Signed to Only Raw Records under Dre'Quan Priest's management in Vice City.
Rudi in GTA 6. The Leonida Man. Viral video character seen in Trailer 1 climbing out of a moving pickup truck at speed.
Stefanie in GTA 6. Correctional social worker at the Leonida DOC. Lucia's parole officer. First character shown in official GTA 6 footage.
Wyman in GTA 6. Mechanic and vehicle procurement specialist. Requests the Mamba GT and Riata Classic. Strong opinions on Lifeinvader data collection.
7X in GTA 6. The viral street gang of Vice City. Clout over territory. Confirmed in Trailer 2. Social media criminals operating across Vice City districts.
Animal Control in GTA 6. Leonida wildlife management. Alligators, pythons, and Vice County wildlife incidents. Confirmed in official footage.
Brute Security in GTA 6. Private armored transport and security in Leonida. Confirmed in official footage. Cash, assets, and armed escorts.
Leonida DOC in GTA 6. State prison system. The game opens with Lucia in custody. Confirmed in both trailers.
High Rollerz in GTA 6. The Vice City illegal street racing crew. Speed, money, and modified vehicles. Confirmed in both trailers.
Leonida Cartel in GTA 6. The primary drug trafficking organization in Leonida. Controls the Port Gellhorn corridor. Confirmed in both trailers.
Leonida EMS in GTA 6. Emergency medical services across the state. Confirmed in both trailers responding to Vice City incidents.
Leonida Fire Department in GTA 6. Fire and rescue across the state. Confirmed in both trailers responding to Vice City incidents.
Leonida State Police in GTA 6. Statewide law enforcement authority. Highway and rural coverage outside VCPD jurisdiction. Confirmed in both trailers.
Leonida Highway Patrol in GTA 6. Highway-specialist law enforcement. The units on the major road network between Vice City and the state interior.
NOOSE in GTA 6. Federal tactical response. The agency that arrives when the wanted level exceeds what VCPD can handle. Confirmed in both trailers.
Outlaw Motorcycle Gang in GTA 6. Rural Vice County and the highway network. Drug running, arms, and confirmed in both trailers.
Real Dimez in GTA 6. Vice City urban street crew. Drug sales and territory control in the Vice City residential districts. Confirmed in official footage.
San 4 San in GTA 6. Vice City street gang with confirmed presence in both trailers. Territorial control in Vice City districts.
VCPD in GTA 6. Vice City Police Department. The primary law enforcement presence in the city. Confirmed in both trailers across all districts.
VCSO in GTA 6. Vice County Sheriff's Office. County jurisdiction outside VCPD city limits. Confirmed in official footage.
Vice Beach Police in GTA 6. Beach patrol on the Vice City waterfront. Confirmed in official footage.
Vice County Corrections in GTA 6. County-level detention in Leonida. Jail operation and prisoner transport. Confirmed in official footage.
Vice County SWAT in GTA 6. Tactical law enforcement response across Leonida. Confirmed in both trailers at high wanted levels.
Vice County Transit in GTA 6. Public transport infrastructure across Vice City and Vice County. Buses and transit confirmed in official footage.
Ambrosia in GTA 6. A rural settlement in Leonida. Confirmed by name in official material. Limited intelligence on file.
Brian's Boat Workshop in GTA 6. Marine repair business at Port Gellhorn. Connected to Brian Heder. Confirmed in official footage.
Delights Port Gellhorn in GTA 6. The primary social venue serving Port Gellhorn. Confirmed in official footage.
Grassrivers in GTA 6. The swamp and wetland region of Leonida. Alligators, pythons, and waterway access. Confirmed in both trailers.
Jack of Hearts in GTA 6. Confirmed strip club in Vice City. Adult entertainment venue in the Vice City entertainment district.
Lake Leonida in GTA 6. Major inland lake in the Leonida interior. Confirmed in official footage. Fishing, boating, and significant open water.
Leonida Keys in GTA 6. Tropical island chain south of Vice City. Coral, shallow waterways, and maritime access. Confirmed in both trailers.
Malibu Club in GTA 6. The Vice City nightclub returning from the original. South Beach landmark. Confirmed in official footage.
Military Base in GTA 6 Leonida. Restricted government zone. Maximum response on entry. Confirmed in official footage.
Monument of Leonida in GTA 6. State landmark confirmed in official footage. The symbolic centrepiece of Leonida's identity.
Mount Kalaga in GTA 6. The highest point in Leonida. Confirmed in both trailers. Wilderness terrain and significant elevation above the coastal plain.
Mount Kalaga National Park in GTA 6. Protected wilderness around the mountain. Trails, wildlife, restricted vehicle access. Confirmed in official footage.
Nine 1 Nine in GTA 6. Vice City nightlife venue confirmed in official footage. Club operation in the Vice City entertainment district.
North Beaches in GTA 6. The northern coastline of Vice City. Less concentrated than South Beach. Confirmed in both trailers.
Ocean View Hotel in GTA 6. Vice City landmark on Ocean Drive. Returning from the original. Confirmed in official footage.
Port Gellhorn in GTA 6. Industrial port town on the Vice County coast. Docks, warehouses, and the marshland corridor. Confirmed in Trailer 2.
Red Hill Forest in GTA 6. Confirmed woodland region in the Leonida interior. Primary Florida panther habitat. Confirmed in official footage.
Shrewsbury in GTA 6. Urban district in Leonida confirmed in official material. Limited intelligence currently on file.
South Beach in GTA 6. The Art Deco tourist strip of Vice City. Maximum foot traffic, neon, and VCPD presence. Confirmed in both trailers.
Starlet Motel in GTA 6. Roadside motel in Leonida. Confirmed in official footage. The lower end of Vice City accommodation.
Vice City is the neon capital of Leonida in GTA 6. Based on Miami, Florida. Beaches, high-rises, nightlife, and maximum law enforcement presence.
Vice County in GTA 6. The county surrounding Vice City. Suburbs, industrial zones, wetlands, and rural sprawl. Confirmed in both trailers.
Yorktown in GTA 6. A settlement in Leonida confirmed by in-world signage. Limited intelligence on record. Reported location.
Airboat in GTA 6 Leonida. Florida swamp transport. Grassrivers navigation confirmed in official footage.
Albany Alpha in GTA 6. Cadillac ATS/CTS performance profile. American luxury sports sedan. Confirmed in Vice City footage.
Albany Buccaneer in GTA 6. Classic Cadillac Eldorado profile. Vice City classic car. Confirmed in official footage.
Annis Elegy Retro Custom in GTA 6. Nissan Skyline GT-R R32 profile with custom build. The tuner icon. Confirmed in official footage.
Annis Hellion in GTA 6. Nissan Frontier off-road pickup profile. Vice County capable. Confirmed in official footage.
Benefactor Schafter LWB in GTA 6. Mercedes S-Class long-wheelbase limousine. The executive transport of Vice City.
Benefactor Schafter V12 in GTA 6. Mercedes-AMG S63 profile. The performance variant of the Schafter executive lineup.
The Blimp in GTA 6 Leonida. Slow, enormous, and visible from everywhere in Vice City. Confirmed in official footage.
Bravado Banshee in GTA 6. Dodge Viper profile. American sports car icon. Confirmed in Vice City footage.
Bravado Bison in GTA 6. Dodge Ram profile. The default Vice County pickup. Confirmed in official footage.
Bravado Buffalo in GTA 6. Dodge Charger profile. The default Bravado sedan in Vice City. Confirmed in both trailers.
Bravado Buffalo S in GTA 6. Dodge Charger SRT/Hellcat performance variant. Confirmed in Vice City footage.
Bravado Gauntlet Hellfire in GTA 6. Dodge Challenger SRT Hellcat profile. The muscle car. Confirmed in Vice City footage.
Bravado Police Buffalo in GTA 6. VCPD Dodge Charger pursuit car. Confirmed in both trailers across Vice City.
Bravado Police Buffalo STX in GTA 6. VCPD Dodge Charger SRT pursuit variant. The high-performance police interceptor.
Bravado Police Gauntlet Interceptor in GTA 6. VCPD Dodge Challenger SRT police vehicle. Confirmed in official footage.
Bravado Rumpo Custom in GTA 6. Dodge Ram Van custom profile. Gang van. Confirmed in Vice City footage.
Brute Camper in GTA 6. Winnebago / Class A motorhome profile. Mobile accommodation for Leonida.
Brute Shuttle Bus in GTA 6. Hotel and airport shuttle bus. Vice City hospitality infrastructure. Confirmed in official footage.
Buckingham Maverick in GTA 6. The civilian helicopter of Vice City. MD 500 / Bell JetRanger profile. Confirmed in official footage.
Buckingham Police Maverick in GTA 6. VCPD and Weazel News helicopter. Confirmed in both trailers over Vice City.
Buckingham Supervolito in GTA 6. Leonardo AW139 luxury helicopter profile. For Vice City's high-net-worth arrivals.
Buzzard attack helicopter in GTA 6 Leonida. Armed reconnaissance. Rockets and machine guns. Confirmed in official footage.
Declasse Sheriff SUV in GTA 6. VCSO Chevrolet Tahoe police SUV. County law enforcement vehicle.
Declasse Tornado in GTA 6. Classic Chevrolet lowrider profile. The Vice City lowrider scene. Confirmed in official footage.
Declasse Tulip in GTA 6. Chevrolet Caprice profile. Classic full-size American sedan. Confirmed in Vice City footage.
Declasse Yosemite Rancher in GTA 6. Chevrolet Silverado / GMC Sierra ranch truck. Vice County working pickup.
Dinka Blista Compact in GTA 6. Honda Civic / Jazz hatchback. The compact car of Leonida. Confirmed in official footage.
Dinka Double-T in GTA 6. Honda CBR / Kawasaki Ninja sport motorcycle. Fast through Vice City traffic.
Enus Jubilee in GTA 6. Rolls-Royce Ghost / Silver Shadow profile. The ultra-luxury car of Vice City.
Ford Explorer Police SUV in GTA 6. Law enforcement SUV in Leonida. Confirmed in the sitemap.
Gallivanter Baller in GTA 6. Range Rover profile. The Vice City luxury SUV. Confirmed in both trailers.
Gallivanter Baller ST in GTA 6. Range Rover Sport SVR profile. The performance SUV variant. Confirmed in official footage.
Grotti Carbonizzare in GTA 6. Italian mid-engine exotic. The Ferrari 458 of Leonida. Confirmed in Vice City footage.
Grotti Cheetah Classic in GTA 6. The classic Italian exotic returning to Vice City. Ferrari Testarossa profile. Confirmed in official footage.
Grotti Furia in GTA 6. The Grotti hypercar. Ferrari LaFerrari profile. The loudest thing on the Vice City waterfront. Confirmed in official footage.
Imponte Ruiner in GTA 6. Pontiac Firebird Trans Am profile. The American classic muscle car. Confirmed in official footage.
Invetero Coquette D10 in GTA 6. American sports car. Cadillac CT5-V or Corvette profile. Confirmed in official footage.
Jobuilt Phantom in GTA 6. Peterbilt 18-wheeler. The biggest truck on Leonida's roads. Confirmed in official footage.
Karin Futo in GTA 6. Toyota AE86 Corolla profile. The drift classic of Vice City. Confirmed in official footage.
Karin Rebel in GTA 6. Toyota FJ Cruiser / 4Runner off-road profile. Vice County capable. Confirmed in official footage.
Karin Sultan in GTA 6. Subaru Impreza / Mitsubishi Lancer profile. The standard Sultan. Confirmed in official footage.
Karin Sultan RS in GTA 6. Track-spec AWD rally car based on the Subaru Impreza WRX STI. Wide-body kit, roll cage, turbo flutter. Sighted in Vice City.
Maibatsu Mule in GTA 6. Isuzu N-Series box truck. The delivery vehicle of Leonida. Confirmed in official footage.
Maibatsu Penumbra in GTA 6. Mitsubishi Eclipse profile. The Japanese sports coupe in Vice City.
Maibatsu Sanchez in GTA 6. Yamaha/Honda dirt bike. Vice County off-road two-wheel. Confirmed in official footage.
Maibatsu Sanchez Livery in GTA 6. Race livery dirt bike. The competition-decorated Sanchez.
Mammoth Dodo in GTA 6. The seaplane returns. Keys and coastal water operations. Confirmed in official footage.
Nagasaki Blazer in GTA 6. Honda TRX ATV. The off-road quad bike. Confirmed in official footage.
Nagasaki Blazer Lifeguard in GTA 6. The beach ATV in lifeguard configuration. Vice City beachfront rescue. Confirmed in official footage.
Nagasaki Carbon RS in GTA 6. Kawasaki Ninja H2 / ZX-10R carbon sport bike. Confirmed in official footage.
Nagasaki Dinghy in GTA 6. Small inflatable boat. The minimal watercraft option for Keys and Grassrivers operations.
Nagasaki Outlaw in GTA 6. Kawasaki KLX / Z900 dirt/street motorcycle. Off-road capable. Confirmed in official footage.
Obey Omnis E-GT in GTA 6. Audi RS E-Tron GT profile. Electric performance sedan in Vice City. Confirmed in official footage.
Obey Tailgater in GTA 6. Audi A6/S6 executive sedan. The Obey daily driver for Vice City professionals.
Ocelot Jugular in GTA 6. British executive sedan. Jaguar XJ profile. The understated alternative to German luxury in Vice City.
Ocelot Locust in GTA 6. British lightweight sports car. Jaguar F-Type or Lotus Elise profile. Fast through corners.
Pegassi Speeder in GTA 6. The Pegassi speedboat. Luxury performance on the Vice City waterways. Confirmed in official footage.
Pegassi Zentorno in GTA 6. Confirmed in Trailer 1. Lamborghini Sesto Elemento profile. The fastest car visible in official footage.
Pegassi Zurrusso in GTA 6. The Pegassi superbike. Ducati Panigale profile. Speed on two wheels through Vice City.
Pfister Astron in GTA 6. Porsche Taycan profile. Electric hypercar from Pfister. Confirmed in official footage.
Pfister Comet 2 in GTA 6. Second-generation Porsche 911 profile. Mid-era Comet in the Pfister lineup. Confirmed in official footage.
Pfister Comet Retro Custom in GTA 6. Classic Porsche 911 profile with custom modifications. Confirmed in official footage.
Pfister Comet S2 in GTA 6. Current-generation Porsche 911 GT3 profile. The driver's car. Confirmed in official footage.
Pfister Comet S2 Cabrio in GTA 6. Open-top Porsche 911 Cabriolet profile. The Vice City coastal driving car. Confirmed in official footage.
Schyster PMP 700 in GTA 6. Chrysler 300C / LX platform executive sedan. American luxury. Confirmed in official footage.
Sea Sparrow in GTA 6. Float-equipped helicopter for Keys and coastal operations. Confirmed in official footage.
Shitzu Longfin in GTA 6. Center console fishing boat. The fishing vessel of Leonida's coastal and Keys waters.
Shitzu Tropic in GTA 6. Open runabout speedboat. Fast coastal transport in the Leonida Keys and Vice City.
Speedophile Seashark in GTA 6. Personal watercraft / jet ski. The Vice City beach and Keys water toy. Confirmed in official footage.
Ubermacht Cypher in GTA 6. BMW M4 Competition profile. German performance coupe in Vice City. Confirmed in official footage.
Vapid Benson in GTA 6. Ford Econoline box truck. The commercial panel truck of Leonida. Confirmed in official footage.
Vapid Bobcat XL in GTA 6. Ford F-150 / F-250 profile. The default American pickup in Leonida.
Vapid Caracara Lifeguard in GTA 6. Lifeguard SUV on the Vice City beaches. Ford Bronco profile. Confirmed in official footage.
Vapid Chino in GTA 6. Classic Chevrolet Impala lowrider. Custom Vice City lowrider scene. Confirmed in official footage.
Vapid Liberator in GTA 6. Monster truck on an F-150 body. Vice County event vehicle. Confirmed in official footage.
Vapid Police Stanier in GTA 6. Crown Victoria police cruiser. Classic law enforcement car. Confirmed in official footage.
Vapid Sandking XL in GTA 6. Ford F-350 Super Duty off-road. Lifted, capable, and Vice County territory.
Vapid Scout Police in GTA 6. Ford Maverick / Bronco Police profile. Compact police SUV in Leonida.
Vapid Towtruck in GTA 6. The tow truck of Leonida. Removes vehicles and serves as a mission tool. Confirmed in official footage.
Western Nightblade in GTA 6. Harley-Davidson Softail profile. The cruiser motorcycle of Leonida.
The Baseball Bat in GTA 6. Blunt melee weapon. Confirmed in Trailer 1 during the gas station heist and in Trailer 2 during a Vice County bar fight.
The Carbine Rifle in GTA 6. Standard assault platform across Leonida. Confirmed carried by law enforcement, Leonida Cartel, and both protagonists.
The Compact SMG in GTA 6. More range and control than the Micro. Still fits in a jacket. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage across Leonida.
The Crowbar in GTA 6. Forces entry and ends confrontations. Confirmed in break-in and brawl sequences in official footage across Vice County.
The Flashbang in GTA 6. Temporary disorientation without fatality. Confirmed in entry and extraction sequences across Vice County.
The Frag Grenade in GTA 6. Clears rooms and disables vehicles. Confirmed in close-quarters and pursuit sequences in official footage.
The Golf Club in GTA 6. Blunt melee weapon. Vice City staple. Technically a sporting item. Confirmed carried in Vice City residential and coastal areas.
The Magnum Revolver in GTA 6. Six-round cylinder. No suppressor. Every shot is a statement. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage across Vice County.
The Heavy Rifle in GTA 6. Punches through cover that stops standard rifle rounds. Confirmed in Leonida Cartel operations in official footage.
The Combat Knife in GTA 6. Silent blade. No sound signature. Confirmed carried by protagonists and Leonida Cartel across Vice County.
The Light Machine Gun in GTA 6. Suppression platform. High capacity. Confirmed in N.O.O.S.E. and Leonida Cartel operations in official footage.
The Machine Pistol in GTA 6. Full-auto sidearm, drive-by capable. Confirmed carried by Leonida Cartel and protagonists across Vice County.
The Micro SMG in GTA 6. Drive-by capable compact submachine gun. Confirmed in vehicle pursuit and street operation sequences in official footage.
The Molotov Cocktail in GTA 6. Incendiary device. Fire spreads and holds. Confirmed across Vice County street operations in official footage.
The Petrol Can in GTA 6. Directed incendiary trail. Pour, ignite, leave. Available at every petrol station in Leonida.
The Standard Pistol in GTA 6. Semi-automatic, 9mm, 35 meter range. Carried by Jason Duval, Lucia Caminos, VCPD, and cartel operatives across Leonida.
The Pool Cue in GTA 6. Found in every bar in Leonida. Confirmed in Trailer 2 bar fight sequence. Snaps on the third swing.
The Pump Action Shotgun in GTA 6. Decisive at close range. Confirmed in forced entry and corridor engagements across Vice County.
The Rocket Launcher in GTA 6. Destroys armoured vehicles and aircraft. Confirmed in maximum-escalation sequences in official footage.
The Smoke Grenade in GTA 6. Cover for movement and extraction across Leonida. Obscures sightlines and disrupts VCPD pursuit. Confirmed in official footage.
The Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle in GTA 6. One round, one result. Confirmed in elevated positions across Leonida in official Rockstar footage.
The Spear Gun in GTA 6. Underwater and coastal weapon. Silent, specific. Confirmed in Leonida Keys operations in official footage.
The Standard Assault Rifle in GTA 6. Full-size platform. More accurate than the Carbine at distance. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage across Leonida.
The Sticky Bomb in GTA 6. Remote detonation explosive. Confirmed on vehicles and structures in Vice City and Vice County official footage.
The Throwing Knife in GTA 6. Silent ranged weapon. No sound signature. One throw, one result at close-medium range. Confirmed in official Rockstar footage.
